Who We Are

More than a court.
A lifestyle.


Pickleflow Social is Delhi NCR's first premium indoor destination where sport, wellness, and community collide. Whether you're rallying on our professional pickleball courts, unwinding at our café, or breaking a sweat in our wellness studio — every visit is a full experience designed for the city's most active, social crowd.

Our Home

AI-Powered
Hero Product

Professional
Pickleball Arena

Three premium indoor courts with imported professional surfacing, engineered for competition and social play alike. Our AI-powered system handles match recording, real-time analytics, automated highlights, and precision line calling.

  • 3 professional indoor courts
  • AI match recording & analytics
  • Automated highlights & line calling
  • Imported professional surfacing
  • Leagues, coaching & tournaments
Dining
Food & Beverage

Café & Social Space

A wood-fired kitchen and curated social space designed for long evenings with good food and great company. Our exclusive F&B partner brings an artisan menu crafted to fuel your game and your conversations.

  • Wood-fired artisan kitchen
  • Curated drinks & post-match meals
  • Community-first seating design
  • Event catering & private dining
Wellness
Mind & Body

Wellness Studio

A holistic lifestyle space inspired by premium wellness brands. Mat Pilates, Yoga, Zumba, and functional fitness — led by top-tier instructors in a beautifully designed studio environment built for serious practitioners.

  • Mat Pilates & Yoga
  • Zumba & functional fitness
  • Top-tier certified instructors
  • Private & group sessions available
Retail
Merchandise

Pickle Flow Shop

Gear up at the Pickle Flow Shop — your one-stop destination for pickleball equipment, premium sportswear, accessories, and exclusive branded merchandise. Everything you need to play and look the part.

  • Professional pickleball paddles
  • Premium sportswear & accessories
  • Exclusive branded merchandise
  • On-site & online availability
Experiences

Play your way

Six reasons to make Pickleflow Social your second home.

01

Social Play

Drop-in sessions, open courts, and community matches every day. Meet your next doubles partner here.

01
02

Coaching Programs

Train with top-tier coaches. Beginner to advanced programmes tailored for every level and ambition.

02
03

Corporate Events

Team outings, tournaments, and group bookings with exclusive F&B packages for your organisation.

03
04

Tournaments

Compete in AI-tracked leagues and ranked tournaments with professional analytics. Glory awaits on the court.

04
05

Private Celebrations

Birthday parties, milestone events, and private hire of the entire venue for moments that deserve more.

05
06

Gaming Zone

Laser tag, PS5, and VR experiences. Because fun doesn't stop at the court — it only gets more interesting.

06
Join Us

Be Part of the Movement

Delhi NCR's most exciting lifestyle destination is here. Get early access, exclusive updates, and be the first to book when we open our doors to the community.
